# FarmBridge Africa

> FarmBridge Africa is an agricultural marketplace connecting farmers and buyers across Africa. Browse, buy, and sell fresh produce, grains, dairy, and more directly between verified producers and buyers.

## Marketplace

- [Marketplace](https://www.farmbridgeafrica.com/marketplace): Browse all available agricultural listings — produce, grains, dairy, vegetables, herbs, and more.

## Account

- [Sign Up](https://www.farmbridgeafrica.com/signup): Create a buyer or farmer account.
- [Log In](https://www.farmbridgeafrica.com/login): Access your FarmBridge Africa account.

## Shopping

- [Cart](https://www.farmbridgeafrica.com/cart): View items added for purchase.

## Notes

Private routes (dashboards, orders, messages, profile, admin, agent tools) require authentication and are not intended for AI crawling.
